# Elena van Engelen-Maslova

> Freelance Kotlin consultant, tech lead, and corporate trainer based in the Netherlands. Available for hire internationally.

Elena van Engelen-Maslova is a freelance software consultant and trainer specialising in Kotlin and cloud-native development on AWS and Azure. She is the author of *Kotlin Crash Course* (BPB Publications), an AWS Community Builder, and a winner of the AWS 10,000 AIdeas Competition (2025, Creative Track).

## Services

- **Kotlin training**: Practical, outcome-focused corporate training for development teams. Courses range from Kotlin basics to serverless cloud on AWS and Azure. Available on-site or remotely.
- **Kotlin consulting**: Hands-on Kotlin tech lead and senior engineer for hire. Embeds with enterprise teams to design and deliver event-driven, serverless, microservice, and AI-integrated architectures.
- **Conference speaking**: Engaging talks with live coding on Kotlin and cloud-native topics. Featured at KotlinConf, Voxxed Days, InfoQ Dev Summit, and J-Spring.

## Training courses

- [Kotlin Basics](https://elenavanengelenmaslova.github.io/training/kotlin-basics/)
- [Kotlin Crash Course](https://elenavanengelenmaslova.github.io/training/kotlin-crash-course/)
- [Bite-size Kotlin](https://elenavanengelenmaslova.github.io/training/bite-size-kotlin/)
- [Kotlin AWS Lambda](https://elenavanengelenmaslova.github.io/training/kotlin-aws-lambda/)
- [Kotlin Azure Functions](https://elenavanengelenmaslova.github.io/training/kotlin-azure-functions/)

## Key facts

- Location: Netherlands, available internationally
- Specialisms: Kotlin, AWS Lambda, serverless, cloud-native architecture, microservices, event-driven systems, AI integration
- Certifications: AWS and Azure certified
- Book: *Kotlin Crash Course* — https://www.amazon.com/Kotlin-Crash-Course-Fast-track-programming/dp/9355516304
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elena-van-engelen-maslova/
- GitHub: https://github.com/elenavanengelenmaslova
- Contact: elenavanengelen@vintik.nl
